{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321230551BEF304A7EEA144AC935C\"}"},"total":444},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618066388997440318","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得非常好，真正的写写出来的不是ai。但是需要加强一点的就是对纸醉金迷也不也就是高档生活的描写，写得细致一些，让大家更有代入感一些。噢。然后我最喜欢三十而已和那个流金岁月的蒋鹏飞就是最近写的那个，希望能把好的生活写得更真实一些，让我们也有代入感一些。","text_exts":[{"e":78,"s":74,"text":"三十而已","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E4%B8%89%E5%8D%81%E8%80%8C%E5%B7%B2\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177410555144AC935C%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227618066388997440318%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227598025557741145150%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%89%E5%8D%81%E8%80%8C%E5%B7%B2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"},{"e":85,"s":81,"text":"流金岁月","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E6%B5%81%E9%87%91%E5%B2%81%E6%9C%88\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177410555144AC935C%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227618066388997440318%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227598025557741145150%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B5%81%E9%87%91%E5%B2%81%E6%9C%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773722139,"group_id":"7598025557741145150","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4vzUT1/ZOxfydKxijr0yMs=","gender":
